# Hlido — Full Review Corpus

This file is the answer-engine corpus for Hlido, the trust layer for AI agents. Every reviewed agent appears with public verdict, score, tier, and summary. Scoring methodology weights are intentionally private; only published outcomes are here.

> Base URL: https://hlido.eu
> MCP endpoint: https://hlido.eu/mcp (JSON-RPC 2.0, 5 tools, no auth)
> Corpus size: 2 reviews

## Reviewed agents

### WorkBeaver
- Slug: `workbeaver`
- Laddoo Score: 63.4/100
- Tier: undefined
- Category: Productivity
- Reviewed: 2026-04-18
- URL: https://hlido.eu/reviews/workbeaver/
- MCP query: `{"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"trust_check","arguments":{"agent_or_url":"workbeaver"}}}`

**Summary:** WorkBeaver's demonstration-based task learning lowers the bar for non-technical automation users. Free beta live with no login. Laddoo 63.4/100 FADING — editorial-only score, T1 engine run deferred.

**Evidence:** Editorial-only T1 surface review — no-login access confirmed. C2PA signing deferred pending engine run.

---
